title: Ibatia elliptica
taxonomy: Ibatia elliptica is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is part of the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The Apocynaceae family is further divided into various subfamilies, with Ibatia elliptica belonging to the Apocynoideae subfamily. The Apocynoideae subfamily is one of the largest and most diverse subfamilies within the Apocynaceae family. Ibatia elliptica's classification also places it within the Apocynaceae order and the angiosperm clade in the broader plant kingdom.

intro: Ibatia elliptica, also known as Ibatia, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. Ibatia elliptica has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory issues due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties.
